metadata.description: A male-presenting individual in their 40s has a medium skin tone with visible pores and some fine lines on the forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is short, salt-and-pepper gray, thick, and styled casually swept back from a slightly receding hairline. Bright blue eyes are almond-shaped and set normally, complemented by thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose is straight with a defined bridge and tip, and the mouth features medium-thick lips. A short, neatly trimmed gray beard and mustache cover the lower face. The overall impression suggests a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern heritage. The expression is neutral, looking directly at the viewer, with the head held straight.
metadata.anchor: Bright blue eyes with salt-and-pepper hair.
